mnemonics.title: LSTM Gates
mnemonics.content: IFO - Input, Forget, Output (order of gates)

mnemonics.title: Attention Formula
mnemonics.content: QKT (Query-Key Transpose) scaled then softmax = Attention

visualTips.visualization: Imagine stacked encoder/decoder layers with attention connectors
Visualize as pipeline with three gates controlling information flow

analogies.analogy: Like conference discussion where everyone briefly talks to everyone else
Security checkpoint with three gates: entry (input), exit (output), trash (forget)
